ddls:
CREATE TABLE "nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "node_name" TEXT /* Name of the node */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the node */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the node's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the node's location */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Description of the node's location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the node the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_node_images_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the node the document belongs to */,
  "document_url" TEXT /* URL of the document */,
  "document_description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_node_documents_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tech_specifications" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical specification */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the node the specification belongs to */,
  "tech_no" TEXT /* Technical identifier for the specification (e.g., DGTech01) */,
  "min_annual_hours" INTEGER /* Minimum annual hours of operation */,
  "max_annual_hours" INTEGER /* Maximum annual hours of operation */,
  "min_load_kwh" REAL /* Minimum load capacity in kWh */,
  "min_units" INTEGER /* Minimum number of units */,
  "max_units" INTEGER /* Maximum number of units */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the specification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tech_specifications_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tech_characteristics" (
  "char_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each characteristic */,
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the technical specification the characteristic belongs to */,
  "existing" INTEGER /* Existence status of the characteristic (0/1) */,
  "age_years" INTEGER /* Age of the characteristic in years */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the characteristic (e.g., good, fair, poor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("char_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tech_characteristics_spec_id FOREIGN KEY ("spec_id") REFERENCES tech_specifications ("spec_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_code" TEXT /* Code for the category (e.g., PN for Primary Nodes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_category_map" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the node */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "changed_data" TEXT /* Details of the changed data */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy data point */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the node the data belongs to */,
  "reading_date" TEXT /* Date when the energy data was recorded */,
  "energy_consumption" REAL /* Energy consumption in kWh */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy forecast */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the node the forecast belongs to */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date when the energy forecast was made */,
  "energy_forecast" REAL /* Energy forecast in kWh */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_forecasts_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)
